title: Cuneiform Tablet #0303: Achaemenid Literary
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Achaemenid period — a literary document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Achaemenid period — a literary document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Achaemenid period. Literary document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records literary matters typical of Achaemenid period administrative or literary practice.
